name: B and B Pawn and Guns
description_short: B & B Pawn and Guns specializes in pawn loans and cash purchases for firearms of all types, from modern handguns to vintage collectibles, with 24/7 insured storage.
description_long:
B & B Pawn and Guns operates as a specialized pawn shop located in Mesa, Arizona, focusing exclusively on firearms and gun-related transactions. The business positions itself as a professional alternative to traditional pawn shops by emphasizing expertise and security in the firearms market.

The company offers three primary services: short-term pawn loans on firearms (with 90-day terms), outright purchases of guns for cash, and free appraisals of vintage and collectible firearms. They accept modern factory brands (Remington, Colt, Ruger, Smith & Wesson, Browning, Mossberg) as well as foreign and collectible firearms (Luger, Beretta, Bersa, Walther). Items pledged as collateral are stored in state-of-the-art secure facilities monitored 24 hours daily and insured by Lloyds of London.

What distinguishes B & B Pawn and Guns is their emphasis on firearms expertise. The store manager is identified as a United States Army Veteran, and the company repeatedly references "gun experts" on staff who provide professional valuations. This positioning directly targets customers uncomfortable with generalist pawn shops and those seeking fair market value for specialized items. The company also explicitly markets to collectors, offering free appraisals for vintage and antique firearms.

As a pawn shop, this business serves a legitimate financial function for customers with firearms collateral who need short-term cash. However, consumers should understand that pawn loans typically carry high effective interest rates over extended periods, and failure to repay means loss of the pledged firearm. The company's exclusive focus on firearms means it cannot serve customers with other collateral types.
pros: 24/7 monitored and Lloyds of London-insured storage facility for pledged firearms
Employment of US Army Veteran as store manager, lending credibility to firearms expertise
Free appraisals offered for vintage and collectible firearms
Stated commitment to paying competitive cash amounts for firearms
Accepts diverse firearms types including foreign and collectible models
State-of-the-art security system for stored items
90-day pawn loan terms available for short-term cash needs
cons: Pawn loans carry high effective interest rates when annualized over time
Collateral forfeiture occurs if loan is not repaid by maturity
Exclusive focus on firearms means no alternative collateral types accepted
Limited to single location (Mesa, Arizona) with no online loan processing mentioned
No details provided on specific loan-to-value ratios or fee structures
best_for: Firearms owners needing short-term emergency cash who prefer collateral-based loans over unsecured debt
Collectors with vintage or specialty firearms seeking professional appraisals and fair market value
Individuals with firearms they no longer need or use who want cash without traditional selling hassles
diagnosis: B & B Pawn and Guns is best for firearms owners needing short-term cash secured by gun collateral, particularly collectors with specialty pieces. The main caveat is that pawn loans are expensive short-term financing with loss-of-collateral consequences if unpaid, and should only be used when other options are unavailable or unfeasible.
services: Free appraisals for vintage and collectible guns
Professional valuation of rifles, shotguns, and handguns
Secure 24/7 monitored storage for pledged firearms
Lloyds of London insurance on stored collateral
Purchase of foreign and collectible firearms
